title: Became a parent
description: Emma arrived at 3:42am. Nothing could have prepared me for the love I felt for her.

title: Ran first marathon
description: Completed the New York Marathon in 4:12. Never thought I'd be a runner, but here we are. Training for this taught me more about persistence than anything else in my life. The last 6 miles were pure mental strength.

title: Moved to New York
description: From the small town to the big city, we were ready for a new adventure. The drive from Dayton, OH, to New York City was a blur of excitement and nerves.

title: Bought first house
description: Signed the papers on a little craftsman in the suburbs. It needs work, but it's ours. The American dream feels different than I imagined, but standing in our own living room for the first time was magical.

title: Got married
description: Married my best friend in a small ceremony surrounded by the people we love most. The rain cleared just in time for the outdoor ceremony. It felt like everything aligned perfectly.

title: Graduated from college
description: Finished my degree in Business Administration. Four years of late nights and early mornings finally paid off.
notes: Mom and Dad drove 6 hours to be there. Seeing their faces in the crowd made it all worth it.

title: Summer in Europe
description: Backpacked through 8 countries with my high school best friend. Best summer of my life. We got lost in Prague, missed our train in Paris, and ate the best pasta in a tiny Roman alley. Pure freedom.

title: High school graduation
description: Graduated with honors. Voted 'Most Likely to Succeed' by my classmates. I had no idea what I wanted to do with my life, but I was ready to figure it out.

title: Grandma passed away
description: Mamaw Eleanor passed away peacefully in her sleep. She was 92 years old. She taught me how to make biscuits from scratch, and I think of her every time I make them. I wonder what life was like for her growing up.
